heading: Submission of plans to State and local officials
label: 2991f Submission of plans to State and local officials

children.heading: Submission to governing body of Indian reservation or Alaska Native village
children.label: a Submission to governing body of Indian reservation or Alaska Native village
children.text: No financial assistance may be provided to any project under or any research, demonstration, or pilot project under , which is to be carried out on or in an Indian reservation or Alaska Native village, unless a plan setting forth the project has been submitted to the governing body of that reservation or village and the plan has not been disapproved by the governing body within thirty days of its submission.section 2991b of this titlesection 2991d of this title

children.heading: Notification to chief executive officer of State or Territory
children.label: b Notification to chief executive officer of State or Territory
children.text: No financial assistance may be provided to any project under or any research, demonstration, or pilot project under , which is to be carried out in a State or Territory other than on or in an Indian reservation or Alaska Native village or Hawaiian Homestead, unless the Commissioner has notified the chief executive officer of the State or Territory of the decision of the Commissioner to provide that assistance.section 2991b of this titlesection 2991d of this title

children.heading: Notification to local governing officials of political subdivision
children.label: c Notification to local governing officials of political subdivision
children.text: No financial assistance may be provided to any project under or any research, demonstration, or pilot project under , which is to be carried out in a city, county, or other major political subdivision of a State or Territory, other than on or in an Indian reservation or Alaska Native village, or Hawaiian Homestead, unless the Commissioner has notified the local governing officials of the political subdivision of the decision of the Commissioner to provide that assistance.section 2991b of this titlesection 2991d of this title
